summary: The team is sprinting toward a September launch of the China Going-Global report with IE, while simultaneously prioritizing SEO for Asia Star and Intelligent China programs and fast-tracking a social media agency selection.
summaryDetail: The biggest initiative is the joint report with IE on Chinese companies going global to Southeast Asia, titled 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global', targeting a September launch at events in Singapore (Tech in Asia Sep 15-16 and Tyson Sep 29-30). The team is translating the Chinese report, drafting op-eds from deans and President Santiago, and meeting with Tech in Asia and Tyson this week to finalize themes and distribution. Concurrently, Asia Star and Intelligent China are the top-priority programs for SEO and promotion; the SEO strategy meeting on June 30 set the direction to prioritize these over US partnerships, with Joseph tasked to audit conversion tracking and draft target audience profiles. Urgent this week: finalize social media agency selection (likely Media Minds due to budget), launch Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI and traditional), and get the Intelligent China webpage ready. Upcoming: draft and distribute the Forbes CEO list press release (July 6), start work on report sections (July 7), and plan activities for Prof. Zhu Rui's new book.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to improve CKGSB's search ranking for programs in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships, and plans to audit conversion tracking setup.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed website menu feedback, brochure updates, CES quotes, campus video, Asia Start articles, Davos press release, social media agency scouting, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and agency selection.

meetings.title: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses a joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a working title 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'. They plan to include a main research piece, op-eds from deans, and industry case studies, aiming for a September launch at events in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional) and introduced a new in-depth program 'Intelligent China' targeting foreigners, with modules in Beijing, Shanghai/Hangzhou, and Shenzhen.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

decisions.text: Asia Star and Intelligent China are top priority programs for promotion.
US partnerships (Stanford, Columbia, Berkeley) are secondary; Berkeley may be considered as third priority.
Shun Tian Shu press release will be either a traditional release incorporating the 10 points or a 10-point article, not both.
Social media agency selection should be expedited; Media Minds is likely the best option given budget constraints.
The report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with joint distribution.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: The working title is 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: The report will include a main research piece from Professor Leeway, op-eds from deans and possibly President Santiago, and industry case studies.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: The target launch is early September, with events in Singapore (Tech in Asia on Sep 15-16 and Tyson on Sep 29-30).
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: The team will skip the article from the dean if it doesn't add value, but it's not a must.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Asia Start will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program is a 12-day in-depth program with three modules, targeting foreigners, starting December 1-4 in Beijing.
Adopt editorial design direction for Knowledge revamp.
Invite all four agencies to participate in the social media ad agency selection.
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: Request for Proposal - social media ad agency 2026 - updated 0703

decisions.text: Use Flow for design of China Going Global report rather than in-house design.
